title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: React Native Developer
description: About Delta3 Delta3 is building the operating system for fandom. We believe the next billion-dollar sports company won't be a club — it'll be the infrastructure behind them. That's us! We make FanOS: a white-label fan economy platform deployed across some of the world's most passionate clubs — Galatasaray SK, Göztepe SK, FUT Esports — powering live broadcasts, gamification, loyalty rewards, memberships, and embedded fintech in one seamless app the club calls their own. We're a small, fast-moving team working on a genuinely hard problem at the intersection of sports, product, and financial infrastructure. If you want to build something that 1.5 million fans interact with — and see your work ship to the world's biggest clubs — this is where that happens. About the Role: React Native Developer We are looking for a React Native Developer to join the Delta3 team and help us build high-quality mobile applications for sports clubs, esports teams, and digital fan engagement platforms. Responsibilities Develop and maintain high-quality mobile applications using React Native and Expo. Build clean, reusable, and scalable component structures with TypeScript. Collaborate closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver seamless cross-platform user experiences. Implement pixel-perfect mobile interfaces based on Figma designs. Optimize app performance, improve animations, and troubleshoot issues across iOS and Android. Contribute to app publishing, release management, and OTA update processes. Required Qualifications Minimum 3 years of mobile development experience, with a strong focus on React Native and TypeScript. Hands-on experience with Expo SDK and Expo tools such as OTA updates and asset bundling. Strong understanding of mobile UI/UX principles and cross-platform development. Experience working with REST APIs and backend integrations. Familiarity with Figma and the ability to translate designs into polished mobile interfaces. Good written and spoken English skills. Preferred Qualifications Familiarity with native iOS and/or Android development for extending React Native apps when needed. Experience setting up CI/CD pipelines for mobile applications. Hands-on experience publishing and updating apps on the App Store and Google Play. Awareness of the latest trends in mobile development. Interest in sports, fan engagement, digital memberships, or Web3 technologies. Delta3 Team Member Attributes Responsible, highly motivated, solution-oriented, and curious. Detail-oriented with a disciplined work approach. Strong teamwork and collaboration skills. No military service obligation for male candidates.

title: Software Engineer, Backend
description: About Codeway Codeway is a global consumer tech company with more than 400M users worldwide. Since 2020, we’ve built and scaled 60+ mobile apps across creativity, productivity, wellness, language learning, and entertainment. Our flagship apps — Retake AI, Cleanup, Learna, and DramaPops — and many of them lead their categories globally. In 2024, we became the most downloaded app publisher on iOS, driven by cutting-edge AI research, sharp data-driven execution, and a relentless focus on product and marketing. We’re a team of 300+ people across İstanbul and Barcelona who bring curiosity, passion, trust, and ownership to everything we build. Recognized as a #1 LinkedIn Top Startup and a Great Place to Work in Europe, Codeway is where ambitious people do their life’s best work. We’re building the next generation of consumer tech and reimagining what mobile apps can be. This is Codeway. This is our way. Join us. POSITION As a Software Engineer, Backend at Codeway, you will design and implement the scalable systems that power products used by millions. You won’t just write code; you will own features end-to-end—from initial system design and AI integration to deployment and production monitoring. Our environment is fast-paced, and we value engineers who can turn complex architectural challenges into simple, elegant, and maintainable solutions. What You’ll Do Design and implement scalable systems. Build high-performance backend architectures for mobile and web clients using Node.js and Python. Own features end-to-end. Take full responsibility for the lifecycle of your services—ideation, implementation, deployment (GCP/Firebase), and continuous optimization. Integrate AI and media workflows. Integrate LLMs and media workflows (STT/TTS, image/video/audio processing), managing model serving, inference performance, and latency/cost tradeoffs. Architect asynchronous workflows. Implement robust event-driven systems using queues and tasks to handle heavy media and AI workloads. Simplify systems. Evaluate every component and process to remove unnecessary complexity and build minimalist, future-proof architectures. Optimize performance. Proactively identify bottlenecks to improve latency, throughput, and costs. Ensure backend quality. Establish robust error handling, security best practices, and end-to-end observability to ensure production reliability. Collaborate cross-functionally. Partner with Mobile, Product, DevOps, and AI teams to design and ship impactful features. What You’ll Bring Experience: 2+ years of professional experience as a Backend Engineer, with a track record of building consumer-facing products at scale. Technical Excellence: Strong proficiency in Node.js and Python with a deep understanding of CS fundamentals, data structures, and algorithms. Infrastructure Knowledge: Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or Firebase, with strong production debugging and observability habits. System Design: A solid grasp of databases, API design, and security best practices. AI Familiarity: Experience deploying and optimizing AI models in production, including familiarity with external AI APIs and their performance considerations. Communication: Proficiency in English with the ability to explain complex engineering decisions and trade-offs clearly to both technical and non-technical teams. Education: A BS or MS in Computer Science or a related technical field. NICE TO HAVE Experience with GCP tools such as Pub/Sub, Cloud Run, GKE, BigQuery, or Cloud Functions Familiarity with SSE or WebSockets for real-time communication Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines Experience with message brokers like Kafka, RabbitMQ, or SQS What We Offer Great Place to Work. As our top team member, you'll be a part of a fast-growing startup and have the privilege to enjoy our accredited “BEST WORKPLACES” environment, ranked first among all workplaces. A Competitive Compensation Package. Long story short, we take care of you. A Meal Compensation. That is actually enough for a decent & nutritious lunch, we’re not following the industry standard. Full Health Benefits. To keep you away from all the trouble, we provide unlimited private health insurance and cover the HPV vaccine. Pet Adoption Support. We cover the primary healthcare expenses, parasite vaccinations, and microchip costs that may arise within the first year after employees adopt a pet. Cool Tech Stack. Macbook, iPhone 15 Pro, magic mouse, magic keyboard; an adjustable desk with a 4K screen and any other gadget you may need in your job. Sport Activities Support. We care about your physical wellbeing and support your gym membership. Learning Never Ends! Training budget to help you grow in your role, gain new skills, and learn new things. Udemy Free Pass. An unlimited Udemy subscription. Flexible Schedule & Unlimited Vacations. This isn’t a “clock in, clock out” company. We care about your productivity, not tracking every minute you’re on site. It’s up to you to always be responsible with your work, no matter where you are or what schedule you’re keeping. English Course Support. Be more global and perform best at your work. Comprehensive Well-being Support. Through our partnership with Meditopia, we now offer free psychological counseling, along with additional services like dietitian, personal trainer, parenting consultant, physiotherapist, child & adolescent therapist, and face-to-face counseling for employees in Istanbul. A Top-Notch Office. Located at the heart of Istanbul, right next to Levent Metro Station at Ferko Signature. Codebrew. Yes, you’ve heard it right: We love coffee so much that we’ve built our own coffee shop inside our office, where we also provide healthy snacks at certain hours. Free Breakfast. At Codebrew - every morning at 9:30 AM. No Dress Code. Dress as you like. Happy Hours Every Friday. Every. Single. Friday. When it’s 5 PM: Screens off, party on! (Check out Codeway on Instagram) Dream Team. Average Codeway member is young, talented, and passionate - which makes our working environment extremely dynamic. Need proof? Take a look at our Instagram. Gaming Area. Whenever you need to take a break from hard work and relax with your favorite games, our PS5 corner will be waiting for you. Software Support. Subscription to any software you might need to perform at your best. Public Transportation Support. Daily public transportation support is on us, covered by an additional monthly compensation. Parent Support. Becoming a parent is a big moment, and Codeway celebrates it with you. We offer a one-time grant to support our new parents. Massage Room. When you need a moment to recharge and unwind, our massage chair room will be ready to offer you a relaxing break. THE RECRUITING PROCESS We are committed to keeping our recruitment process short and transparent. Here’s how it looks like: Application: Send us your CV or LinkedIn profile. You can also just write a few words about yourself. Case Study: We might send you a task to solve. Talent & Culture Interview: Let’s talk about your experience & expectations and see what we can achieve together. Technical Interview: You will meet with future team lead to go over the case and your technical capabilities in detail. Reference Check: We will contact your references to gain insights into your past experiences and work ethic. Welcome Aboard! You are now a part of the team. Your personal data that will be collected through your applications made due to this advertisement will be processed automatically by the data controller Codeway in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK") and relevant legislation for the purpose of conducting job application processes. You can access detailed information on this matter from the "Candidate Information Notice" page at https://www.codeway.co . Codeway processes the personal data of job applicants in accordance with relevant legislation. " Privacy Notice for Employee Candidate " summarizes the data processing procedures during the application process. Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumlusu Codeway tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla otomatik yollarla işlenecektir. Detaylı bilgiye https://www.codeway.co adresindeki "Aday Aydınlatma Metnimizin" sayfasından ulaşabilirsiniz. Codeway, iş başvurusu yapan adayların kişisel verilerini, ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde işlemektedir. "Çalışan Adayı İçin Gizlilik Bildirimi" başvuru sürecindeki veri işleme süreçlerini özetler. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Job Title: Full Stack Developer (Java / Spring Focus) Overview: Responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications with a primary focus on backend systems built using Java and the Spring ecosystem. Contributes across the full stack but with deeper ownership of API design, business logic, and system integration. Key Responsibilities: - Backend Development (Primary Focus) Design and implement RESTful APIs using Java and Spring (Spring Boot, Spring MVC) Develop scalable, secure, and high-performance backend services Integrate with databases, third-party APIs, and internal systems Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code Optimize application performance and troubleshoot production issues Participate in code reviews and enforce best practices - Frontend Development (Secondary Focus) Assist in building and maintaining user interfaces using Angular framework Collaborate with designers to translate UI/UX requirements into functional components Ensure responsive design and cross-browser compatibility Requirements: 3 years of software development experience Strong proficiency in Java Hands-on experience with Spring Framework (Spring Boot required) Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs Angular experience is highly desirable Experience in MySQL or PostgreSQL and good knowledge of SQL Unit Testing and mocking. E2E tests Understanding of Web standards cross-platform, cross-browser issues Preferred Qualifications & Skills: Experience with microservices architecture Knowledge of Spring Security and authentication mechanisms (JWT, OAuth) Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and cloud platforms (AWS is a plus) Basic understanding of DevOps practices Excellent debugging and problem solving skills Passion for clean code and clear naming conventions

title: Lead Backend Engineer (Golang)
description: Location: Fully remote (EMEA timezone) Start date: ASAP Languages: Fluent English required Industry: Cloud Computing / AI / European Deep-Tech SaaS About The Role Pragmatike is recruiting on behalf of a European deep-tech company building a decentralized, energy-efficient alternative to traditional cloud providers . Their platform operates on distributed bare-metal infrastructure with advanced automation, delivering sovereign, high-performance compute for modern workloads. We are seeking a Lead Backend Engineer (Staff-level mindset) with strong expertise in Go and production-grade peer-to-peer (P2P) systems . This is a highly technical role focused on distributed systems, system-level programming, and performance-critical backend services. You will play a key role in designing and evolving the backend foundations of a decentralized cloud platform, working closely with infrastructure, product, and DevOps teams. Autonomy, ownership, and strong architectural judgment are essential. Your Responsibilities Design and develop scalable, distributed, server-side applications and microservices using Go. Build and optimize mission-critical backend software, with a strong focus on system programming, concurrency, and performance tuning. Design and implement robust peer-to-peer (P2P) communication systems (P2P experience is mandatory). Contribute to or build systems using libp2p or similar P2P frameworks. Ensure cross-platform compatibility and consistent application behavior across environments. Collaborate within an Agile/Scrum team, contributing to backlog refinement, risk identification, and dependency management. Produce clean, maintainable, and reusable code, following strong engineering standards. Optimize backend systems for performance, reliability, security, and fault tolerance. Establish and enhance backend infrastructure, including deployment pipelines, observability, and monitoring tooling. Work across multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and collaborate closely with infrastructure teams. Participate actively in the full application lifecycle, from design to production operations. Engage with product and design teams to deeply understand end-user and platform requirements. Conduct thorough code reviews, mentor other engineers, and raise overall backend engineering quality. Champion best engineering practices and a culture of high-quality software craftsmanship. Required Qualifications 5–6+ years of experience as a Senior or Lead Backend Engineer. MS degree in Computer Science or a closely related technical field. Strong hands-on expertise in Go and/or Java (Go strongly preferred). Solid understanding of software design patterns, concurrency, and multi-threaded programming. Proven production experience with P2P architectures (mandatory). Strong knowledge of internet protocols and technologies (TCP/IP, HTTP, etc.). Experience with service-oriented architectures (REST, JSON, API design). Ability to design secure, well-structured RESTful APIs and understand their client-side implications. Deep understanding of Agile development principles and collaborative team environments. Strong communication skills and ability to influence technical direction. Preferred Qualifications Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes. Experience in infrastructure engineering and running production systems. Strong skills in logging, tracing, and observability to diagnose production issues quickly. Proven track record building large-scale, high-availability, business-critical systems. Solid experience with multi-cloud deployments (AWS, Azure, GCP). Direct experience with libp2p, decentralized systems, or related open-source projects/startups. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and modern DevOps practices. Why Join Us Our client is redefining cloud infrastructure through decentralization and advanced automation , offering a sovereign, energy-efficient alternative to hyperscale cloud providers. Youll join a deeply technical environment where architecture matters , performance is critical, and your decisions will directly shape the evolution of a complex, ambitious platform operating at the intersection of distributed systems, networking, and cloud infrastructure. Pragmatike is committed to a fair, transparent, and inclusive recruitment process. We do not discriminate based on age, disability, gender, gender identity or expression, marital or civil partner status, pregnancy or maternity, race, religion or belief, sex, or sexual orientation. In accordance with GDPR, your personal data will be processed lawfully, fairly, and securely, and used solely for recruitment purposes, including sharing it with our client(s) for employment consideration. You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. We are committed to maintaining the confidentiality and security of your information throughout the recruitment process.
